series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to O.R.C. 4121.36 and 4121.10 this record series consists of executive meeting minutes of the agency Commissioners and their votes/decisions on varying issues. topics compiled in a journal.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain only until transfered into electronic format then secure shred. ; Electronic: Retain 75 years on site from date of meeting held then delete. Provide annual link to State Archives ., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
